recent_bad_license_projects.name: fmae
recent_bad_license_projects.summary: This project provides the official Python library of FMAE (Fuzzy Model-Agnostic Explanation), which is a post-hoc XAI method designed to explain the decision-making behavior of pre-trained black-box predictive models.
